brand_identity.name: Quizz+
brand_identity.tagline: Le savoir, version africaine du fun.
brand_identity.description: A mobile-first educational platform that blends African cultural pride with high-end gamification. Dark, mysterious, yet vibrant and rewarding.

layout_system.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#1B2042] overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl
mobile_first_rules: All touch targets must be min 44px height
Bottom navigation bar for primary actions
Important content within 'thumb zone' (bottom 50% of screen)
Horizontal scroll for secondary lists (Themes, Badges)

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B35] hover:bg-[#FF8C5A] text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(255,107,53,0.4)] transform transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#C9A84C] text-[#C9A84C] font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-full hover:bg-[#C9A84C]/10
buttons.ghost: text-[#F5EFD9] hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 py-2 px-4 rounded-lg

cards.base: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer active:scale-[0.98]

inputs.field: bg-[#0D1526]/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#F5EFD9] placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#C9A84C] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C9A84C] transition-all outline-none

motion.philosophy: Fluid, playful, and rewarding. Every tap should feel like a small win.

assets.icon_strategy: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 2px. Color: White or Gold (#C9A84C) depending on context.

universal_guidelines: ALWAYS use the mobile container constraint (max-w-md mx-auto) for all pages.
The default background is #1B2042. Do NOT use white backgrounds anywhere.
Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and micro-interactions.
Do NOT use generic gradients. Use the specific brand gradients defined.
Buttons must have a pill shape (rounded-full) for the main CTA.
Cards should have a subtle glass effect (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5).
Text must be readable on dark backgrounds (use #F5EFD9, not pure white).

page_specific_rules.onboarding: Use full-height images with a gradient overlay (bottom to top) to ensure text readability. Gold accents for the 'Next' button.
page_specific_rules.dashboard: Use a Bento-lite grid for stats. Horizontal scroll for 'Themes'. Highlight 'Daily Quiz' as the primary action.
page_specific_rules.quiz_game: Clean interface. Question text large (text-2xl). Timer prominent (Gold). Answer options large and easy to tap.
page_specific_rules.leaderboard: Top 3 users get special styling (Gold, Silver, Bronze glow). The rest of the list is a clean table/list.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end, culturally resonant PWA. Do not cut corners on the 'feel'. The app should feel like a premium game, not a boring quiz. Use the provided image URLs to add texture and life to the backgrounds and onboarding. Strictly adhere to the color palette.
